title: Steamed Green Olive Salad
description: A fresh and tender dish featuring green olives in an Australian-inspired steam preparation that's nut-free-friendly.
instructions: Place green olives in a steamer basket over boiling water.
Steam for about 5 minutes until tender.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
In a mixing bowl, combine cooled olives with finely chopped red onion and fresh parsley.
Drizzle lemon juice over the salad mixture to taste.
Toss gently to mix all ingredients evenly.
